creator: sfarley@tivoli.com
text:
I am moving the source from my domain (farley.org) over to SourceForge.
	I had only intended the code to be up on my site temporarily.  That was
	several months ago.  I also updated the homepage to actually point at
	some relevant data.

	I would have done this from my home, but my ISP will shortly NOT be
	my ISP for the very reasons I am not sending from home.  :(
